elements.content: This regression proves that a zone-owned field actor remains part of the same zone as later chunks revisit it, instead of disappearing once regional continuation begins.
The same regional rock should stay part of the zone while later chunks intersect later slices of that zone.

Regional body flow should continue past the carried field instead of resetting to a fresh unrelated page-local strip. This side zone proves the host is still one regional map with multiple local participants while the main zone continues.
Normal document flow resumes after the zone-owned field continuation is finished.
